item.title: I'm Just a Bill: School Bus Electrification
item.description:
👀 School Bus Electrification

Federal school bus electrification 119th Congress: EPA Clean School Bus Program continuation · Tribal/rural priority · charging-infrastructure. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 2 + Universal Pre-K + School Meals. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
